spec: Holo UI component registry every shadcn + Magic UI element (components, blocks, charts, examples) encoded as a content-addressed, self-verifying, editable UOR object, wired to the canonical --holo-* tokens for one-place dynamic control.
resolve: import an element by its `holo` specifier (holo://sha256:<moduleκ>); browsers resolve via vendor/importmap.json + SRI, the native host via its holo:// re-derive-or-refuse handler. `renderExport` is the primary export to render (default for demos/blocks/charts). `did` is the source identity (did:holo:); holo://X ↔ did:holo:X is a prefix swap.
